zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Furnival於1323年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普時，她的父親Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival31歲，母親Joan de Verdun20歲。她與Walter Montgomery結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1385年在英國德比夏爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Furnival于1323年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普时，她的父亲Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival31岁，母亲Joan de Verdun20岁。她与Walter Montgomery结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1385年在英国德比夏爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Furnival was born in 1323, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, was 31 and her mother, Joan de Verdun, was 20. She married Walter Montgomery. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1385, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Furnival est née en 1323, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Verdun, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Montgomery. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1385, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Furnival 1323 in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival 31 und ihre Mutter Joan de Verdun 20. Sie hat Walter Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Furnival è nata il nel 1323 nel Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan de Verdun, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Walter Montgomery. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1385, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnivalが1323年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップで生まれた時，父Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnivalは31歳，母Joan de Verdunは20歳であった。Walter Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1385年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnival(이)가 1323년 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Verdun(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Walter Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 더비실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Furnival nasceu em 1323, em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Verdun, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Montgomery. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1385, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Furnival родилась в 1323 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Verdun, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Montgomery. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1385 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Furnival nació en 1323, en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Verdun, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Walter Montgomery. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1385, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
